# Extração: 4.3

- **Fonte:** 4.3.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.05 MB

---

The Ads Sniper Strategy focusses on cutting bad performing ads, based on
ad set performance.
A simple yet powerful technique to get your cost per
Lead/Reg/Install/Purchase etc down across your account quickly and
effectively.
Key learnings
● Drill down from campaign to ad set to ad based on your key metric(s)
● Use the average KPI performance at Campaign level to concentrate
on underperforming and overperforming Ad sets
● Use the average KPI performance at Ad set level to concentrate on
which Ads need focus, pausing and replacing bad ads in particular
(with replacements coming from the graduation strategy)
● Learn why automation isn't a silver bullet
● Discover how to use Filters and Saved Reports to speed up your
decision making
Ads Sniper Strategy Example
